title: Automate M365 to Google Workspace Migrations with ADK multi-agents
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates building multi-agent systems for automating enterprise migrations using the Agent Development Kit (ADK). The tutorial covers multi-agent orchestration with SequentialAgent, self-correcting loops with LoopAgent, context caching, and deployment to production via Google Agent Engine.
